programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The teens compete in their high school Oddball Games and win the coveted Noble Lion Trophy.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When the Power Rangers go up to Billy's uncle's mountain resort to study for their science test, Goldar seizes the opportunity of having them altogether to call on the Crystal of Nightmares.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The class project is a time capsule and all our power teens bring something significant to class to share with future generations. Mrs. Appleby contributes a photo of the Power Rangers, which makes Rita immensely jealous.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Trini is having some difficulties learning the Praying Mantis technique from kung fu expert, Master Lee. He assures her that her technique will improve with time and with some additional practice.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When Billy gets a "B" on a test instead of his usual "A," he fears he will not make The Young Scientists of America club.

programme.desc: Jason and Tommy team up to teach a self-defense class to middle-aged women. Bulk and Skull join the class -- thinking that it will be an opportunity to meet "babes."

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers

programme.desc: Jason and Zack try to help young Roger make Ernie's junior soccer team. The eavesdropping Rita commands the creation of a monster to kick around the Rangers.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Princess and the EVP
programme.desc: The final day has arrived –it's Grant's last investigation with TAPS. And where better to close out his phenomenal run but at Jason and Grant's very own haunted property, Spalding Inn, located in Whitefield, New Hampshire.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Please Sign the Ghostbook

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Serial Killer's Revenge
programme.desc: Jason and the TAPS team head to Charleston, South Carolina, one of the most haunted cities in America and winner of Ghost Hunters America's Hometown Ghost Hunt Contest.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Camp Fear
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Jason and TAPS go to camp! They head to Camp Rutledge in Georgia where a woman has experienced paranormal activity since she was a teenager.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: French Quarter Massacre
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads out to New Orleans, Louisiana to investigate their first case without Grant: The Jimani Lounge Massacre.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Don't Feed the Apparition
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS revisits a familiar city, Alexandria, Louisiana, but this time, they're there to investigate the Alexandria Zoo.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghostly Refuge
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Oswego, New York to investigate the renowned Fort Ontario. TAPS has investigated many forts, but never one that once served as a sanctuary for Jewish refugees during World War II.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Paranormal Politics
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads down South to help two different families find some closure. First stop is Baton Rouge, Louisiana to investigate the Old State Capital Building, which has endured theCivil War and a congressman's death.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Curtain Call
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Joliet, Illinois to investigate the Rialto Square Theater, which is becoming known for being more than just an entertainment venue.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Fear Factory
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Claremont, New Hampshire to investigate a former shoe and furniture factory, the Topstone Mill. What was once an abandoned space has now become a restaurant and bar...

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Tunnels of Terror
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Lockport, New York to investigate an underworld of tunnels. It holds a mystery of possible murder, multiple deaths and frightening phenomena. What stories do the spirits of Lockport Caves want to tell?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Heir Apparition
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Hampton Falls, New Hampshire to investigate the Governors Mansion, a property Steve has investigated before with a local team.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.desc: In the dark of night aliens fly their war ships to earth and abduct all the parents in Jimmy’s hometown of Retroville. So it’s up to Jimmy to rescue the abducted parents.

programme.title: The Wild Thornberrys Movie
programme.desc: In the heart of Africa, The Thornberrys are filming their action-packed wildlife show. They’re ready for anything with a fully-equipped off-road vehicle and a daughter who has a secret gift.

programme.title: Son of Bigfoot
programme.desc: Teenage outsider Adam sets off on a daring quest to find his long-lost father only to learn that he is the legendary Bigfoot! Adam soon discovers that he too has powers like his father, but an evil corporation who wants their DNA is hot on their trail!

programme.title: The Wild Thornberrys Movie

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay is trapped on Nadakhan’s ship, as Nadakhan tries to force him to make his third wish. Lloyd, Cole, and Nya are marooned on Tiger Widow Island.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja are trying to figure out a way to save Jay from Nadakhan’s ship. Two screenwriters, Kevin and Dan, suggest that they build a fake raid zeppelin and disguise themselves as Sky Pirates.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have been holed up at the police precinct, but the Sky Pirates track him down. They flee by boat to the lighthouse where Zane’s father was once held captive. Nadakhan learns that the ninja still have the Tiger Widow venom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Blood Moon
programme.desc: While protecting Ninjago City from daily threats, the Ninja encounters a new elemental master in league with an old enemy.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: Ras attacks the Cloud Kingdom to obtain information on the Forbidden Five; Euphrasia informs the ninja and they set off to save the kingdom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Beyond the Phantasm Cave
programme.desc: Cinder and Jordana compete for Lord Ras's favour; the ninja set out to find a teacher who can defeat the Wolf Clan; Wyldfyre sneaks on the Destiny's Bounty.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Force From the East
programme.desc: The ninjas find two old dragon masters who agree to train them. Meanwhile, Ras invades the Land of Lost Things.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Spell at the Waterfall
programme.desc: Egalt teaches the Rising Dragon to the ninja; Sora and Riyu learn Spinjitzu from Rontu; Cole reaches the Monastery with the Finders and sets off on an adventure with Zane.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: To Mysterium
programme.desc: Cole, Zane and Bonzle travel to Mysterium, only to fall into Dorama's trap; Arin is frustrated with his Spinjitzu training.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Fugitives From Madness
programme.desc: Zane, Bonzle and Cole meet their creator Gandalaria. Kai is appointed the third Dragon Master. The dragon masters turn into stone sculptures as the blood moon appears in the sky. The other ninja's training ends prematurely.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Secrets of the Wyldness
programme.desc: When Rontu and Egalt turn to stone, Lloyd's visions lead the ninja to Wyldness. There, the ninja seek shelter in the sorceress's warehouse. Cole and Zane fight against the administration and allow Bonzle, Sprite and Gandalaria to escape.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Forest of Spirits
programme.desc: Cole, Zane and Gandalaria search for a release spell and obtain magical powers. The ninjas rush to the Ritual of the Blood Moon to stop Lord Ras. Kai and Sora disguise themselves as Wolf Mask Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Rising Ninja
programme.desc: The blood moon ritual begins. Ras has everything he needs to free the Forbidden Five. The ninja confronts him and tries to disrupt the ritual; Kai and Bonzle are trapped in the portal, but Lloyd and Arin are there to help.

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Unwilling to tell his friends "No," Leo finds himself needed in three places at once during the street fair fundraiser for the new community center.

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter
programme.desc: The student council is accepting ideas for this year's big initiative! Aliya races to think of a proposal as Brad's bad idea grows in popularity.

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Struggling to choose only one of her friends' many ideas for what should go inside the new community center, Aliya must find a different solution.

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Trying to make the final preparations for the big opening of the community center, the friends' plans are disrupted by the Seniors' weekly Bocce game.

programme.title: Friends The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Hours from the launch of the community center, Autumn must free Aliya from the nurse's office while Olly and Paisley hold last minute auditions.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: A movie promotion stunt goes wrong, unleashing a humongous "Cubby the Cop" balloon on the city. Fire Chief McCloud accidentally buys a malfunctioning Twirly Hat for her nephew.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Police Chief Wheeler announces the formation of the 700 million dollar Sky Police. Police captain, Tom Bennett, gets a call that his wife has gone into labor early.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Fendrich and Sinclair compete to win the City's tallest building contest. An off-screen narrator narrates a day in the life of a helpful handyman, Harl Hubbs.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's "Hands Off Day!" a city holiday, where the entire city doesn't use their hands for anything. A nature documentary crew follows Billionaire Fendrich as if he was an animal in the wild.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: A boat collision ruins Lupin and Fujiko's quiet boating expedition. They discover a woman named Linda in the other boat just as gunmen on a larger boat attack them.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko successfully pull off a heist; that is until Zenigata manages to shoot Lupin with a tranquilizer dart. Zenigata hauls Lupin off to jail. Despite Fujiko's best efforts, she cannot break Lupin out of prison.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: With the help of some quick gunplay by his partner Jigen, Lupin takes on the world in elaborate heists, classic car chases, and nasty explosions. Fujiko, a buxom redhead with a penchant for betrayal, always gets tangled up in Lupin's capers.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: One rainy afternoon, a man seeks Lupin's help on behalf of a young woman. The woman is actually Fujiko, who is after a diamond known as "The Star of Killamanjaro". The diamond was implanted into the chest of a mob boss.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/18/12: Max Scherzer struck out 10 batters and Miguel Cabrera homered to lead the Tigers in Game 4 of the ALCS, completing a four-game sweep of the Yankees.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 4/1/2013: Clayton Kershaw crushes his first career home run on Opening Day in 2013, breaking a scoreless tie in the 8th inning to go along with a shutout performance on the mound in the Dodgers' 4-0 win over the Giants.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 5/21/13: Mike Trout becomes the youngest player to ever hit a cycle, logging a single, double, triple, and a home-run in the Angels' 12-0 win over the Mariners.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/2/13: Desmond Jennings drove in two runs and Alex Cobb struck out five batters over 6 2/3 innings to help lead the Rays to a 4-0 Wild Card shutout win over the Indians.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/29/14: The Giants turn to lefty Madison Bumgarner for the final five innings of the seventh game of the 2014 World Series and are rewarded with a performance for the ages as they clinch their third title in five years.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Clayton Kershaw makes history in Los Angeles with a near-perfect outing against the Rockies, as the Dodgers lefty strikes out 15 in a dominant no-hitter.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A girl from rural California goes to Los Angeles to work as a go-go dancer, but soon gets involved with drug dealers.

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K 25th Anniversary
programme.desc: In part one of the complete history of MST3K, Joel and the rest of the crew discuss the show's origins and the DIY feel of the early seasons.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Rocket Attack U.S.A.
programme.desc: The crew watches the second chapter of The Phantom Creeps and a film about an American spy sent to the Soviet Union to investigate a missile attack. Joel hosts a quiz show with the Bots.

programme.title: MST3K: Bloodlust
programme.desc: Mike and the Bots watch a cheap ripoff of The Most Dangerous Game, where a rich game hunter tricks a group of stranded college kids into becoming prey for his latest blood sport.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A high school senior named Sue and her boyfriend want to get married right after Sue graduates. A marriage counselor discourages the young couple from entering into a hasty marriage.

programme.title: MST3K: Beyond Atlantis
programme.desc: A new test subject arrives on the Simulator of Love, and her crew watches BEYOND ATLANTIS (1973).

programme.title: MST3K: Munchie

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Amor comprado

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A dragon regains his boyish form, a noble warrior once feared dead makes a shocking resurrection, and bitter enemies set aside their differences to enjoy a well-deserved feast!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The weary marines and the rescued children get teary-eyed as they say goodbye to the Straw Hats. Meanwhile, Law enters into treacherous negotiations with Joker!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: On their way after having set out from Punk Hazard, the Straw Hats find out their next destination - just as a huge wave comes crashing down on the Sunny! But it's rough sailing for the G-5 as well, as Donflamingo arrives on the scene and wreaks havoc!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Aokiji's intercession saves Smoker and sends Joker off to rethink his strategy, leaving unanswered questions about Aokiji's current status. Meanwhile, the Straw Hats catch their breath as the Sunny makes its way through the rough seas of the New World.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Smooth seas stretch out before the Straw Hats as they leave Punk Hazard far behind -- but while they fear Donflamingo's return and prepare to face him, another foe lies in wait, whose powers could be their downfall!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Breed has Luffy, Trafalgar, and Chopper firmly in his grasp with his Peto-Peto power! Breed dreams of a world in which he has enslaved all the humans, but Luffy's stubborn persistence and unwillingness to cooperate may have landed him in hot water.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dressrosa! Luffy and the Straw Hats divide into teams and set about their business on this passionate, enchanting island! But here, in the heart of enemy territory, danger lurks around every corner. Luffy and the others encounter a mysterious blind man.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Out and about in Dressrosa, Luffy and his team encounter a mysterious and powerful blind gambler - and run into trouble while his shocking powers distract everyone! Meanwhile, a major event in the Colosseum draws huge crowds.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Sanji, and Kin'emon strike off in search of the thieving fairy who has taken Zoro's sword, but Sanji finds himself mesmerized by the beautiful dancing of a gorgeous Dressrosa woman - with a deadly secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy enters the Corrida Colosseum in order to compete for Ace's Flare-Flare Fruit! But with the mightiest warriors of the New World assembled and standing in his way, the competition will not be easy. The first stage of the competition is a battle royal.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the deadly battle of Block A winds down, all the onlookers in the stadium are shocked to discover the secret identity of the winner! Meanwhile, Luffy's cover may be blown as another voice from the past returns.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy meets an unexpected acquaintance from the past, Bellamy, who seems to be up to no good! Meanwhile, Caesar Handover Team encounters a snag when they learn just how dangerous Green Bit is!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle heats up and the widely despised Bartolomeo takes the ring! But he'll have to contend with both the Prodence Kingdom contingent, and Dressrosa's own local favorite, Bellamy! From up above, Luffy risks having his cover blown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chinjao continues to provoke Luffy, hoping to gain revenge against the grandson of his sworn enemy, Garp! But as the argument continues, Luffy risks having his cover blown, and his identity revealed! Meanwhile, the battle in Block B rages.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle for Block B hits a crescendo as King Elizabello II prepares his devastating King Punch! But as the powerful attack becomes imminent, the Prodence Kingdom faction unravels! All that may be pointless, though.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the handover team approaches Green Bit, they are attacked by the fearsome fish that live off the coast of Dressrosa. But that's the least of their problems as they find the bridge to Green Bit has collapsed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro tracks the thief who stole his sword - and learns about a danger facing the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Law, Usopp, and the others arrive at Green Bit only to find it inhabited by strange creatures, and swarming with the Navy soldiers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: All but done for, Sanji is trapped by Violet and her crew when she suddenly changes her mind and mysteriously turns on her own men! Meanwhile, Robin and Usopp come face to face with the Little People known as the Tontatta Tribe.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji gets in touch with Law in order to share a shocking secret - that could unsettle the Straw Hats' plans in Dressrosa for good! Meanwhile, Luffy's Block C battle begins, but will his Gum-Gum powers give him away?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Franky try to regroup after Doflamingo's betrayal, hoping that destroying the factory is not yet out of their grasp. Meanwhile Luffy makes a friend in the Colosseum and Usopp ends up thrust into an uncomfortable position!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Sunny is mysteriously deformed by the bizarre powers of Giolla! Can Nami, Chopper, and Brook act in time to save their beloved home? Meanwhile, the battle for Block C continues as Luffy suffers a staggering setback.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After knocking down the Giant, Hajrudin, as payback for what he did to Ucy, Luffy has to deal with Ideo, whose punch has the destructive force of a bomb, while the Funk Brothers show off their bizarre fighting technique.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Chopper, and Brooke keep trying to evade Jora and win back the Sunny even though it's been turned into a piece of art! In the Colosseum, Don Chin Jao finally faces Luffy - whose power will prove greater?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy stands along against Don Chinjao, and learns about the old grudge he bears against Garp! Meanwhile, Usopp and Robin get swept up in the Tontatta Kingdom's raid against the royal family, and Franky learns the eerie secret of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontatta Kingdom gears up for its all-out assault on the Doflamingo Family, as Usopp and Robin are caught up in the war effort! Meanwhile, Franky arrives the headquarters of the toy movement where he finds Zoro, Nami & the others are cornered by Jora.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chin Jao's hatred of Garp and Luffy is finally explained, while his battle against Luffy comes to an end. With tremendous power, one of them is squarely eliminated! But is that really the end of the Colosseum battle?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the battle with Don Chinjao long behind him, Luffy advances to the final round! Block-D contender Cavendish, however, takes the chance and pounces on Luffy, who is defended by an unlikely ally! The agenda of Colosseum gladiator Rebecca is exposed.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda discovers a shipment of bio-armor, with terrifying results.

programme.desc: The Andromeda gets caught in a war between two ships that includes a fatal disease - one that Dylan picks up.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead

programme.desc: Ruby reveals herself to Ash as she tries to strengthen her bond with Brandy to defeat The Prophesized One. Meanwhile, Pablo and Dalton continue to spar, unsure of one another.

programme.desc: The DNA results are revealed; Maggie seeks the advice of a psychic; a wild lead is pursued at the top of a mountain; Maggie sits down with Maura's family and reveals evidence released by law enforcement for the first time in 13 years.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: Natalee Holloway disappears from Aruba in May 2005, and her father Dave never stops looking for her; he receives a new lead that could be the key to solving the 12-year-old mystery, but he has suspicions about the source.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: Dave Holloway and a team of investigators pursue a lead that may shed light on his daughter's disappearance, with the goal of obtaining a taped confession and concrete evidence.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: The sting operation in New Orleans continues as the investigation team begins running out of time to obtain the necessary information from the co-conspirator.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: TJ and his team head to Aruba to begin phase two of their investigation - attempting to obtain DNA evidence from Natalee's alleged burial site; Dave must convince his informant to go the extra mile.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: TJ races to the location where the co-conspirator claims he dug up Natalee's remains in 2010; working with the Aruban authorities, they search for DNA that could lead to convicting those involved in Natalee's disappearance.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: After two years following a lead, the investigators finally have evidence in hand that could answer the 12-year-old mystery of what happened to Natalee Holloway.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon
programme.desc: Phoenix Coldon vanishes; investigative reporter, Shawndrea Thomas, and retired deputy Police Chief Joe Delia attempt to unravel the mysterious unsolved case in the hope of finding justice for Phoenix.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon
programme.desc: Joe and Shawndrea follow up on a handful of Phoenix sightings since her disappearance and begin to question whether she'd been lured into a new life more dangerous than she could have anticipated; a surprising lead goes to an unexpected locale.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After the naked body of an Ohio State senior is found, investigators bring in a suspect for questioning; they play a dangerous game of give and take hoping to get the truth and bring justice to the victim and her family.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Investigators speak for the first time on one of the most baffling cases they've encountered, exposing the truth about what happened to Shanann Watts and her two daughters at the hands of a seemingly devoted husband and father, Chris Watts.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.desc: Hoping to score big on the East Coast, Mike and Frank make stops in Virginia, DC, and Maryland, and are delirious when they find themselves waist-deep in a treasure-packed machine shop. Harry's property is wired for maximum security.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: A Whole Lotta Jerry Lee Going On
programme.desc: The team gets a rock and roll history lesson when they meet the woman at the epicenter of the 1950s Jerry Lee Lewis child bride scandal.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Pair of Jokers
programme.desc: The guys bid on a timepiece once owned by Elvis and Joker returns to the shop with a furry friend to hunt down a deal.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Jimmie's Last Stand
programme.desc: The guys head out to the old west where a customer brings in a rare Lone Ranger collection.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Ice Chip Off The Old Block
programme.desc: The guys get tangled up in the Bigfoot monster myth when a "certified" lock of his hair drops into the shop.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Paintball Cajun Style

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Mumbo Gumbo
programme.desc: A famous canon rolls into the shop, and an old friend causes some Cajun confusion trying to pawn an old family gumbo recipe.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Horseplay
programme.desc: Tammie and Johnnie try to lasso a deal on an antique toy horse, and a customer walks in with a very rare weapon.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Really Gotta Go Kart
programme.desc: The guys check out an old go-kart that, with the help of Yankee's restoration powers, has the potential to become something extraordinary.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While Mike and Frank pick the back roads of Minnesota, they challenge Danielle to sell a ten-foot fiberglass cowboy boot that's been gathering dust for over a year.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Danielle turns up a good lead she's been working on for months. When Mike tells Frank let's pack up for a trip to South Dakota, Frank says he can't.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: With a Noah's ark of exotic animals, the guys visit a Maine taxidermist where Mike gambles big money on a huge elephant head. Danielle's search for a pachyderm-loving buyer leads to a wheelin' and dealin' rock'n'roll legend.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Tricky Dick's Tennessee yard is littered with treasures, and though he isn't motivated to part with any of it, Mike goes hog-wild for a vintage pig ride that could be worth some serious coin.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Jimmie's Increasingly Bad Day
programme.desc: It's father vs. daughter when Tammie bets her dad that she can brighten his day and make a profit on a unique bar-on-wheels.

programme.title: Hardcore Henry
programme.desc: Henry is resurrected from death with no memory, and he must save his wife from a telekinetic warlord with a plan to bio-engineer soldiers.

programme.title: Echo Boomers
programme.desc: Michael Shannon stars in this gripping crime-thriller. When Lance Zutterland leaves school in mounting debt, he is pulled into a criminal operation made up of rebellious college graduates who steal from the rich and give back to themselves.

programme.title: The Killer Elite
programme.desc: James Caan and Robert Duvall star in Sam Peckinpah's tense, action-packed thriller that explores savagery and betrayal in the murky world of killers-for-hire.

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike is a tough hitman, who makes his hits look like accidents or suicide. He's in a gang of hitmen, each with his own style. When his loved ex is killed, Mike looks for those responsible.

programme.title: Close Range
programme.desc: A rogue soldier turned outlaw is thrust into a relentless fight with a corrupt sheriff, his obedient deputies, and a dangerous drug cartel in order to protect his family.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers
programme.desc: In 1965, America is at war with North Vietnam and Lt. Col. Hal Moore prepares his troops for one of the most violent battles in U.S. History: “The Valley of Death”.

programme.title: Windtalkers
programme.desc: True story about members of the Navajo tribe who proudly served the U.S. in WW II as code talkers by using their native language as a code to relay information to military leaders.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Vietnam: Phoenix from the Ashes
programme.desc: Around 10% of the world's species live in Vietnam, with tropical jungles fit to burst with wildlife. But less than 50 years ago, things were very different. During the war, Vietnam's forests were decimated, but as it always does, life fought back.

programme.title: Uncaged
programme.desc: The alligators lurk in the swamps next to huge pythons, turtles, and manatees.

programme.title: Secret Nature
programme.desc: A world without houseflies, mosquitoes and louse flies might sound attractive, but discover their secret nature to find out how they have adapted to live anywhere on earth, and why the would be hard to replace.

programme.title: Ultimate Oceans
programme.desc: Driven by instinct, the unstoppable slick of fish is followed by one of the greatest gatherings of predators.

programme.title: Epic Safari Destinations
programme.desc: Pamuzinda Safari Lodge is only one and a half hours from the capital - Harare. With Lawrence as her guide, Kristina embarks on an entertaining horse-back safari, and interacts with Jasmine the giraffe

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Malaysia: Freaks of Nature
programme.desc: Malaysia is one of a handful of countries in the world described as mega-diverse. Malaysia's animals and plants have exploited every opportunity to carve out an existence and so have adapted to some very strange ways of life.

programme.title: Epic Animal Encounters
programme.desc: In the Kruger National Park in South Africa Dianne Tipping-Wood finds a boomslang and a chameleon in a duel on the tar road.

programme.title: Wildest India: Western Ghats: Monsoon Mountains
programme.desc: The western Ghats are a spine of mountains that lay claim to being one of the most bio-diverse places in the world. In the east tigers and wild dogs compete for prey in the dry forests. While the western Ghats hold the key to life across southern India.

programme.title: The Original Fight Club
programme.desc: There are many reasons for animals to fight and each have their own weapons and rules of combat.

programme.title: Secret Nature
programme.desc: It's not just mankind that craves a place to call its own; animals are he ultimate engineers and evolved countless ways of molding their worlds long before we came on the scene.

programme.title: Masai Mara: The Big Hunt

programme.title: Waterlife

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia and Robin's untested machines start breaking down on the brutal trek up to the Wolverine mine site.

programme.title: Jade Fever

programme.title: Jade Fever

programme.title: Alone

programme.title: Alone

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: A family is subjected to a vicious attack during a brutal home invasion; a rail yard worker risks his life to save a town; and a realtor is attacked by a man posing as a client.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: A convenience store worker plays dead to escape her abductor. An endurance athlete faces her greatest challenge ever after falling 60 feet in a remote canyon.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Elk hunting in Montana, Laramy stalks in on a massive bull. With only his bow and arrow, Laramy takes the shot and proves his worth. But making the shot is only half of the battle.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: For the final challenge, RuPaul sends her All Stars on a junket that culminates with a stand-up routine at L.A.'s Comedy Store. Cheri Oteri is their comedy coach and is joined on the judge's panel by The Gossip's Beth Ditto.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a string of armed robberies target various businesses, the team investigates a suspect who leads them to something much bigger. Also, OA worries about his future when his investments begin to go south.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When an off-duty diplomatic security agent is fatally shot in New York City trying to apprehend someone, the team investigates if there's a connection to his time working in Croatia.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The shooting of a federal corrections officer leads the team to an ex-Marine who has gone rogue ever since he returned from Afghanistan. Tiffany's sister looks to her for guidance when their younger brother begins to lash out.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: This episode is part two of the three-episode FBIs Global Crossover Event which continues with FBI: MOST WANTED episode "Imminent Threat – Part Three.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the deputy commander of an Air National Guard Base is kidnapped and forced to give over access codes, the team must work quickly to find the suspect along with stolen ammunition.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a trucker is gunned down after a routine trip from Canada, all signs point the team to a noted criminal on the FBI's Most Wanted Terrorists list. Also, Jubal gets to work with an old friend and colleague, Detective Jack Lombardo.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team has only hours to investigate a last minute tip that could exonerate a dangerous mob boss on the eve of his execution. Meanwhile, Charlie attempts to help the CalSci basketball team break their incredible losing streak.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The investigation into a professor's death takes a dangerous turn when the team finds their lead suspect has ties to a radical animal rights group.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When the FBI is called in to investigate a series of home invasions, the team uses Charlie and his math skills to help profile the suspects, but when his calculations go awry during a raid, Don suffers a life-threatening injury.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Still feeling responsible for Don's near-fatal stabbing, Charlie puts his focus into tracking down an unnoticed serial killer, with the agents revisiting math theories from when Charlie first started working with the team to help solve the case.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team investigate a string of copycat bank robberies and zero in on disgraced FBI Agent Roger Bloom as a suspect when they discover he has been studying the files of some of the original bank heists.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When Amita is abducted, Don and the team's frantic search for her leads them to a charismatic sociopath, but it is up to a distraught Charlie to discover what the suspect's bizarre plans for her are on the fifth season finale.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team must protect a political activist from a possible sniper.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team try to find 12-year-old Eric Miller, who was last seen in the boys' bathroom at his school. Eric's blood was found on a mirror shattered during an apparent scuffle

programme.title: The Kill Room
programme.desc: A hitman, his boss, an art dealer and a money-laundering scheme that accidentally turns the assassin into an overnight avant-garde sensation, one that forces her to play the art world against the underworld.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: An ex-con and his devoted wife must flee from danger when a heist doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: The Boondock Saints
programme.desc: Two Irish Catholic brothers become vigilantes and wipe out Boston's criminal underworld in the name of God.

programme.title: Brawl in Cell Block 99
programme.desc: When Bradley (Vince Vaughn) is sent to prison, he is forced to commit acts of violence that turn the place into a savage battleground.

programme.title: Lila & Eve
programme.desc: Lila, a grief-stricken mother reeling from her son's murder, attends a support group where she meets Eve, who urges her to take matters into her own hands to track down her son's killers. They soon embark on a journey of revenge, but also recovery.

programme.title: Killer Elite
programme.desc: A special-ops agent must rescue his mentor.

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: An F.B.I. Agent goes undercover to catch a gang of surfers who may be bank robbers.

programme.title: F/X
programme.desc: Rollie Tyler, a movie special-effects man, accepts $30,000 from the Justice Department's Witness Relocation Program to stage the fake assassination of a mob figure who has agreed to name names.

programme.title: Bound
programme.desc: Caesar’s a guy who launders money for the mob. What’s the last thing that would come between a sleazy wise guy like Caesar and that money? A couple of women with brains to die for and bodies to match.

programme.title: The Defender
programme.desc: Lance and his team are bodyguards for NSA's head sent by the president to a secret meeting outside Bucharest which is attacked. But Why?

programme.title: The Boondock Saints
programme.desc: Two Irish Catholic brothers become vigilantes and wipe out Boston's criminal underworld in the name of God.

programme.title: Bound
programme.desc: Caesar’s a guy who launders money for the mob. What’s the last thing that would come between a sleazy wise guy like Caesar and that money? A couple of women with brains to die for and bodies to match.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. "This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Lean on Pete
programme.desc: When 15-year-old Charley rescues an aging racehorse, Lean on Pete, from imminent slaughter, the two embark on a treacherous odyssey across the new American frontier in search of a new home.

programme.title: Waves
programme.desc: Waves traces the epic emotional journey of a suburban African-American family as they navigate love, forgiveness, & coming together after a loss—a heartrending story about the universal capacity for compassion & growth even in dark times.

programme.title: The Prince of Tides
programme.desc: Barbra Streisand and Nick Nolte star in the stunning screen adaptation of Pat Conroy's best-selling novel, THE PRINCE OF TIDES. Nolte is Tom Wingo, a disillusioned Southern coach who must reveal his tortured childhood in order to help his suicidal sister.

programme.title: True Grit (2010)
programme.desc: True Grit is a powerful story of vengeance and valor set in an unforgiving and unpredictable frontier where justice is simple and mercy is rare.

programme.title: No Country For Old Men
programme.desc: Winner of four Academy Awards, including Best Picture, filmmakers Joel and Ethan Coen (FARGO) bring to the screen a thrilling bestseller in which a crime-scene's irresistible stolen loot sets forth an unstoppable chain reaction of violence.

programme.title: Super 8
programme.desc: In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a Super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident.

programme.title: Stargate
programme.desc: When an ancient Egyptian artifact is discovered, two men unlock its secret power as a portal through time and space.

programme.title: Max Steel
programme.desc: Teenager Max McGrath is adjusting to a new school when his body starts to generate strange energy flare-ups that he can't control.

programme.title: Skyline
programme.desc: Jarrod and Elaine travel to Los Angeles to meet his friend Terry and his wife Candice. Terry gives a party in his apartment for Jarrod. The next morning, the group is awakened by beams of light. The group of friends try to escape from the alien invaders.

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: A woman stands between giants and destruction of her town.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.title: You Gotta Eat Here
programme.desc: It's authentic Napoletana pizza & pasta for host John Catucci at Pizzeria Via Mercanti, then he dusts up on his barbecue rib rubbing skills at Moonshine BBQ.

programme.title: You Gotta Eat Here
programme.desc: At NuBurger, host John Catucci comes face to plate with the Shang- Awesome; he visits Poutineville where Montreal's best known ingredient - smoked meat.

programme.title: You Gotta Eat Here
programme.desc: Host John Catucci knows you can eat like a bird or chow down on a giant chimichanga at The Wren.

programme.title: The F Word (UK)
programme.desc: GORDON RAMSAY challenges CHRIS MOYLES to cook in a Fast Food race against his local takeaway. Today's brigade are four Estate Agents, cooking sauteed black pudding, sage and onion rosti and soft boiled eggs, breadcrumbed veal escalope and a tiramisu.

programme.title: The F Word (UK)
programme.desc: This weeks brigade are the 'Desperate Housewives' from Nottingham who serve up broad bean risotto with scallops, pork chops with apple, raddichio and a courgette tempura, and a dessert of cherry samosas. Will they do better than last week’s team?

programme.title: The F Word (UK)
programme.desc: Tonight’s amateur brigade is a team of tough female police officers from Lancaster, who will be cooking a delicious meal of roast pigeon with wild mushroom and asparagus salad, roast skate with beetroot and pain perdu with caramelised peaches.

programme.title: The F Word (UK)
programme.desc: This week's brigade of passionate amateurs, four ex Army Captains, take on pea, asparagus, pancetta & goat's cheese frittata followed by honey roast duck with green beans and a hazelnut vinaigrette and a classic baked alaska for dessert.

programme.title: The F Word (UK)
programme.desc: This week, Nicole Appleton, Melanie Blatt and their mums cook a delicious starter of angel hair pasta & clams, spiced pork chops with crushed sweet potatoes and a classic apple tart while Nicole’s husband Liam Gallagher watches from the dining room.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: The Mercado Lazaro Cardenas is standard as far as markets in Mexico City go, but turn one corner, and you are in the world of coffee geeks, of which Rick is a proud citizen. Rick also meets with mixologists Joseph Mortera and Ricardo Nava.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Chef Edgar Nuñez wants to change the world. Like Rick, Edgar believes everyone should have access to fresh, local food, that Mexican chefs should embrace their own cuisine, and that mentoring the younger generation is very important.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Carlos Yescas wants to introduce outstanding artisanal Mexican cheeses to the world. Join Rick and Yescas as they scour Mexico for the best cheese producers and visit Mexico City to find chefs that integrate the cheeses into their menus.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Who do Mexico City's top chefs believe will be the next great chef to emerge from Mexico? Pablo Salas. The odd thing is, Salas does not work in Mexico City. His restaurant, Amaranta, is in Toluca, and Rick travels to meet him there.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati learns that carne asada goes way beyond grilled meat in Sonora. It’s an important weekly ritual that brings the whole family together. Back home, Pati throws a carne asada in her backyard for her husband and boys.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Sonoran wheat has shaped the cuisine of the entire Mexican north and is a staple of Sonoran cuisine. Pati tours one of Hermosillo’s oldest flour mills and gets a lesson on making coyotas, a traditional dessert, at a local bakery.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati spends a day in the kitchen with her middle son, Sami, cooking recipes inspired by her travels in Sonora that she knows he’ll love – beef and potato chimichangas, rice with lentils and caramelized onions, and an avocado and radish salad.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati travels to Sonora’s coast on the Sea of Cortez, where local legend Toño Contreras gives her a tour including shellfish on the beach, his restaurant Mariscos El Rey, and his home kitchen for some crave-worthy recipes.

programme.title: John and Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa demonstrate simple and sumptuous recipes that can be made with one pot.

programme.title: John and Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa evoke a French-bistro feel with their French onion soup, mussels and fries.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Ming and Adam Richman, host of Man V. Food and Man Finds Food, mix up a fun Port-Au-Prince Sour. Then, it’s on to their own styles of BLTs. Adam makes a Salmon BLT while Ming prepares a Kosher BLT without the bacon, lettuce, or tomato!

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Joanne Chang of Boston’s Flour franchises prepares Vietnamese Espresso Ice Cream-filled Profiteroles with Spicy Ganache. Ming counters with a Pâte à Choux Two Ways—Tea Smoked Salmon with Cream Cheese, Chives and Lemon, and Devil’s Balls.

programme.desc: The town of Haddonfield, Illinois, celebrates Halloween for the first time in five years, only to be joined in the festivities by maniacal mass murderer Michael Myers, with his nemesis, the inveterate psychiatrist Dr. Loomis, hot on his heels.

programme.title: Halloween H20: 20 Years Later
programme.desc: 20 years ago, evil escaped incarceration in the form of Michael Myers, leading to a bloody killing spree on Halloween. Now, Michael has returned to terrorize a new generation, starting with original final-girl Laurie Strode (Jamie Lee Curtis).

programme.title: Halloween VIII: Resurrection
programme.desc: A group of college students win a contest to spend the night in the childhood home of brutal serial killer Michael Myers. They expect a few scares, but none of them are prepared for what awaits them in this frightening follow-up to HALLOWEEN H20.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity
programme.desc: After a young, middle-class couple moves into what seems like a typical suburban house, they become increasingly disturbed by a presence that may or may not be demonic and active at night.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 2
programme.desc: As a couple welcome a newborn baby into their home, a demonic presence begins terrorizing them, tearing apart their perfect world and turning it into an inescapable nightmare.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Writer-director Quentin Tarantino delivers an iconic cast of characters in PULP FICTION, a wildly entertaining tale of violence and redemption. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman, and Bruce Willis star in this pop culture phenomenon.

programme.title: Resurrecting the Champ
programme.desc: An up-and-coming sports reporter rescues a homeless man, only to discover that he is, in fact, a boxing legend believed to have passed away.

programme.title: Cell
programme.desc: John Cusack and Samuel L. Jackson star in this mind-blowing thriller based on the novel by Stephen King about a cell phone signal that triggers apocalyptic terror.

programme.title: World's Greatest Dad
programme.desc: Robin Williams stars as Lance Clayton, a man who has learned to settle. He dreamed of being a rich and famous writer, but has only managed to make it as a high school poetry teacher. His only son Kyle (Daryl Sabara) is an insufferable jerk.

programme.title: Peter's Friends
programme.desc: After ten years, a young aristocrat invites his college theatrical friends and mates for a New Year's reunion, BIG CHILL-style. As the eating and drinking proceed, all manner of former relationships, emotional traumas, and secret agendas are revealed.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility
programme.desc: Emma Thompson stars in the captivating romance based on Jane Austen's classic novel of two sisters' search for love in strict Victorian society.

programme.title: Killer Instinct with Chris Hansen

programme.title: Killer Instinct with Chris Hansen
programme.desc: Anthony Lee used to be a well-known drag queen in Tampa's nightclubs. But while cooking dinner at his friend Tiffany's house, he's gunned down by an angry intruder as Tiffany hides in the bathroom. The motive will lead Chris Hansen to uncover his killer.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: Rod has one night to solve a case before it's taken out of his hands.

programme.desc: A popular cheerleader is murdered in a hail of gunfire.

programme.title: Intervention

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Identical twins Sonia and Julia, 22, shared everything as children and grew up in a loving home.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Aaron was a mixed martial arts champion, but at the height of his career, he started working in adult films. Through the porn scene, Aaron was introduced to crystal meth.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Although she has two loving children and an adoring husband, Danielle is dangerously addicted to Percocet. As a teen, Danielle felt neglected by her alcoholic father and began cutting herself.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: This follow-up episode features former subjects Chad and Brooke as they rediscover their lives during and after treatment.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: An employee is found dead in a restaurant kitchen. Clues found near the body include an empty cash register, a knife, and a trail of blood splotches leading to a vandalized car in the parking lot.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: Discover the most powerful telescopes on the planet as they search for the mysteries of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it’s also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: They key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Young Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: When a plague of bizarre, puzzling murders grip London, young Holmes and his new found friend Watson find themselves unwittingly entangled in the dark mystery.

programme.title: Rain Man
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars as an idealistic young wheeler-dealer whose life is changed forever when he discovers he has an autistic savant older brother (Dustin Hoffman, in a Best Actor Oscar-winning performance).

programme.title: Bandits
programme.desc: The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: The Cotton Club Encore
programme.desc: Francis Ford Coppola's lavish, 1930s-era epic comes to a vivid new life in this newly remastered and restored version featuring never-before-seen scenes and musical sequences.

programme.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula
programme.desc: Gary Oldman, Winona Ryder and Anthony Hopkins star in director Francis Ford Coppola's visually stunning, passionately seductive version of the classic Dracula legend. Rated: R

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Yukon Men
programme.desc: It's goose-hunting season. The conflict between Stan and Joey leads them to a rite of passage. A confrontation looms after Bob fails to meet his responsibilities with Charlie. James goes hunting on deadly grounds. Pat must put his trust in newcomer, Sean.

programme.title: Black Gold

programme.title: Black Gold

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: Yukon Men

programme.title: Yukon Men

programme.title: Storage Wars New York

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre desnudo y delirante está en el porche de su vecino. Un conductor trata de correr, pero deja los zapatos atrás. Una pareja tiene dificultad en seguir adelante después de un evento trágico.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La posible sentencia de ir a prisión asusta a un sospechoso y huye. Los oficiales ayudan a unos padres a razonar. La policía intenta detener a una mujer furiosa que atacó a su exnovio con un martillo.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.desc: An aphasia-like virus planted in DS9's food replicator system by the Bajoran underground against their onetime oppressors lies dormant until being activated during refurbishment.

programme.desc: The nature of Trill symbiosis is explored when a Klaestron commando legal team tries to kidnap Jadzia Dax for alleged treason committed by Curzon, the prior Dax host.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.desc: When Big Moe discovers his daughter, Mouse, is secretly drone-racing, he heads to Whale Island to bring her home. Mouse must stand up for herself and prove to her dad that her true calling is in the competition.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: It's the Sirens vs the Tikis vs the Tao Twins in a race to recover a totem hidden on the Spiderweb Circuit. But Mina is convinced that Corto has joined forces with Sun to drive the two star-crossed kids apart to win the race.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: When a blackout suspends the Whale Cup, Corto worries that she won't win the competition in time to save her island. She and the Tikis try to restore power to White Island by going in search of a crystal in an ancient Aqua base

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: When Enki discovers an archived video of a young Wyatt Whale drone-racing, it quickly goes viral and soon everyone wants to race their mentor.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: The Tikis must team up with Team Mirage for their next race, and worse: Corto must fly in sync with Hannah or risk losing. Mouse tries to play coach and diplomat, but the two just can't get along.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: When Corto pays her a compliment, Debbie becomes her number one fan and even quits Team Starfish to join the Tikis. But when she realizes she's not welcome, Debbie vows to take revenge during their next race.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Every time Sonic runs, his speed causes a deafening tone, so he's forced to give up his speed until a solution can be found. / Tails reprograms one of Eggman's robots and accidentally turns it into a killing machine.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: A meteor causes Sonic and Eggman to exchange bodies. / Orbot and Cubot wake up with no memory of the previous day's events and discover that Eggman is missing.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Adam and Megan's fighting gets worse and he forces her to move out, while Barbara helps Jenelle and invites her to Jace's first birthday. Leah and Corey's romance heats up, and Kailyn moves back in with Jo's parents.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Corey shocks Leah with a marriage proposal, but things get hard when they get bad news. Chelsea tries to focus back on school, while Kailyn gets another job so she can move out. Jenelle and Kieffer have to find a place to live.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle and Kieffer ask Barbara if they can move in with her. Chelsea's dad strains her to have Adam to find a job.Kailyn starts dating her ex without telling Jo. Leah and Corey put the wedding on hold to bring Ali in for an MRI.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jo faces Kailyn about dating Jordan, she moves in with her mom. Leah and Corey plan for their wedding when they get good news about Ali. Jenelle and Kieffer plan to run off to New Jersey. Things between Chelsea and Adam crumble.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah and Corey fight when she reconsiders the wedding. Chelsea breaks up with Adam and celebrates with freinds. Jenelle and Kieffer enjoy New Jersey and Barbara realizes her credit cards are gone. Kailyn settles in with her mom.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea argues with Adam about child support and finds out he has a new girlfriend, while Jenelle has to face the music about using her mom's credit cards.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea plans for Aubree's birthday, while her dad tries to keep Adam from coming. Jenelle is arrested for breaking and entering and sees kieffer is a bad influence. Kailyn signs a custody agreement, Leah and Corey get married.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle is back with Kieffer after bailing him out of jail. Leah feels isolated and decides to get a job. Chelsea struggles with whether to give Adam another chance. Kailyn and Jordan take Issac trick or treating.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah is devastated when she finds out Ali must be sedated for an MRI. Jenelle is living in her car with Kieffer. Chelsea gives Adam another chance but re-tears her ACL. Kailyn can't afford to live on her own.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn moves out without telling her mom. Jenelle files charges against Kieffer. Chelsea relies on Adam to take care of Aubree while she recovers from surgery. Corey and Leah get emotional during Ali's MRI.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Ali's MRI comes back negative to the relief of Leah. Jenelle juggles finding peace with her mom and dealing with Kieffer's domestic charges. Kailyn tries a new form of birth control. Chelsea fends for herself after surgery.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn adjusts to being alone for the holidays. Jenelle regrets filing charges against Kieffer. Leah works to make the holidays special for the twins. Chelsea and Adam make up but Randy bans Adam from the holiday celebration.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Ali may have a genetic disorder. Jenelle and Kieffer must face court for their breaking and entering charges. Chelsea finds out that her old friend is pregnant. Kailyn gets annoyed when she notices Jo's not around for Issac.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kieffer is upset that Jenelle hung out with an old boyfriend. Leah is relieved that Ali has no major genetic disorder. Adam slips back into his old ways, much to the dismay of Chelsea. Kailyn considers filing for child support.
